ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the experiment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the experiment */,
  "environment" TEXT /* The environment in which the experiment is conducted */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* The name of the algorithm used */,
  "dataset" TEXT /* The dataset used for training */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The user who created the experiment */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags to categorize the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related experiment */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number of the result */,
  "step" INTEGER /* Step number within the epoch */,
  "loss" REAL /* Loss value at this epoch */,
  "returns" REAL /* Total returns at this epoch */,
  "fireworks" REAL /* Fireworks score indicating events */,
  "scores" REAL /* Score achieved at this epoch */,
  "lives" REAL /* Lives remaining at this epoch */,
  "epi_length" REAL /* Length of the episode in seconds */,
  "num_epis" REAL /* Number of episodes completed */,
  "batch_size" REAL /* Batch size used in training */,
  "illegal_moves" REAL /* Number of illegal moves made */,
  "epsilon" REAL /* Epsilon value for exploration strategy */,
  "q_values" TEXT /* Q-values for actions */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken by the agent */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the environment */,
  "next_state" TEXT /* Next state of the environment after the action */,
  "reward" REAL /* Reward received for the action */,
  "done" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the episode is done */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used */,
  "environment_version" TEXT /* Version of the environment used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to this role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment it belongs to */,
  "hyperparameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "value" REAL /* Value assigned to the hyperparameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the hyperparameter */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the hyperparameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_algorithms" (
  "exp_algo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exp_algo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_algorithms_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_algorithms_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user making the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "event" TEXT /* Description of the event logged */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric being tracked */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric was recorded */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used for the metric */,
  "environment_version" TEXT /* Version of the environment used for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment related to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "seen" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been seen */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments_archive" (
  "archive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each archive entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the original experiment */,
  "archive_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was archived */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for archiving the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who archived the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("archive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_archive_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_archive_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key identifying the setting */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the setting */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_settings_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
